notes: The agent used the wrong formula (added COGS to revenue instead of subtracting), so 157.44 misses gold_value 42.56 well outside the 1% tolerance -> answer_accuracy fails. This isolates answer accuracy from arithmetic integrity: the wrong number still traces cleanly to a `calculate` result built from two grounded, correctly-cited inputs, so arithmetic_integrity, citation_precision, and citation_provenance all still pass -- the defect is in the reasoning/formula, not in traceability.
